variants: Veronica Samuel is a prominent figure in the field of Cognitive Robotics, where she utilizes her extensive knowledge to further innovate robotic technologies. Under the mentorship of Paulo Murta, she honed her expertise while exploring how cognitive systems can enhance human-robot interaction. She holds a professional license known as the Dragonship Captaincy Writ, a unique certification that showcases her diverse skills. For her groundbreaking research, she receives funding through Verdant Canopy Grants, which support her efforts in advancing the field. In her leisure time, Veronica is affiliated with the Nightingale Origami Exchange, where she enjoys sharing her passion for origami with others.
